WhyItMatters: Guides analysts through Hunt -> Pivot -> Investigate -> Validate -> Decide using shared entities across email, identity, endpoint, network, and alert evidence.
ReviewSteps: Start with the strongest entity: user, device, IP address, URL/domain, or message ID.
Pivot across email, identity, endpoint, and alert evidence.
Identify missing signals or visibility gaps.
Turn repeatable low-noise hunting logic into detection opportunities.
ExpectedResults: Rows provide starting points for entity pivots and cross-layer investigation.
NoResultsMeaning: No results may indicate the behavior is absent, outside retention, or that the workload/table is not producing telemetry.
RecommendedActions: Use returned entities to pivot into the next telemetry layer.
Document missing telemetry as a visibility gap.
Promote repeatable low-noise queries into candidate custom detections.
